g.onclick: sendPrompt('Who uses Shipyard IDP and how?')
sendPrompt('What does Backstage do in Shipyard IDP?')
sendPrompt('How does ArgoCD work in this platform?')
sendPrompt('What does Crossplane provision in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does the observability stack monitor?')
sendPrompt('How do services get deployed to Kubernetes?')
sendPrompt('What gets created in GitHub automatically?')

text.style: writing-mode: vertical-rl; transform: rotate(180deg) translate(8px, -348px);fill:rgb(194, 192, 182);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto
